Dear Times Reader,

End 2013 without regret -- today is your last chance to try a 
Times Digital Subscription at the year's best price: 99 cents 
for 12 Weeks. Spark your curiosity throughout 2014 with the 
news, insight and perspectives that will enrich your world. 

Get more informed, inspired and challenged with unlimited access 
to nytimes.com and our apps for smartphones or tablets or both. 

Have the world's finest journalism at your fingertips anytime, 
anywhere. Act now to take advantage of this special, 
limited-time offer: 99 cents for 12 Weeks.

This sale expires on December 30, 2013, 9 a.m. E.T. 

Promotional offers valid for new subscribers only. New York 
Times digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader

canceled. If the subscription is canceled, refunds and 
termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. 
Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. Other 
restrictions and taxes may apply.

12 Weeks for Just 99¢         


Dear Times Reader,

End 2013 without regret — today is your last chance to try a Times Digital Subscription at the year's best price: just 99¢ for 12 weeks. Spark your curiosity throughout 2014 with the news, insight and perspectives that will enrich your world.

Get more informed, inspired and challenged with unlimited access to nytimes.com and our apps for smartphones or tablets or both.

Have the world's finest journalism at your fingertips anytime, anywhere. Act now to take advantage of this special, limited-time offer: just 99¢ for 12 weeks.

ACT NOW TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THIS SPECIAL, LIMITED-TIME OFFER.
You received this e-mail because you are a registered user of The New York Times.

This sale expires on December 30, 2013, 9 a.m. E.T.

Promotional offers valid for new subscribers only. New York Times digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader editions, Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords apps. Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. You will be billed 99 cents for the first 12 weeks up front which is nonrefundable. After the first 12 weeks, all subscriptions will automatically renew and your credit card or PayPal account will be charged in advance of each four-week billing period unless canceled. If the subscription is canceled, refunds and termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. Other restrictions and taxes may apply.
